description_long: This is a classic ball-peen hammer featuring a robust, metallic head with two distinct ends: one flat striking face and one rounded peen. The head is made of steel and is securely mounted on a straight, smooth wooden handle that is slightly contoured for grip. The handle is light brown, showing the natural grain of the wood, while the head is metallic gray with a matte finish. The hammer's head is relatively compact, with a cylindrical shape and a rounded ball on one side, making it suitable for metalworking and shaping tasks. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or damage on the hammer, and it appears clean and well-maintained. The overall design is utilitarian, with no additional attachments or accessories.
description: A ball-peen hammer with a steel head and a straight wooden handle, featuring a flat face and a rounded peen. The hammer is clean, with a natural wood handle and a matte gray metal head.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the profile of the steel head with both the flat and rounded ends visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical shape of the hammer head and the width of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle and the rounded peen end of the hammer head.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the head's dual ends and the attachment point to the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, smooth surface, natural wood grain, no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Ball-peen hammer head, steel, with one flat striking face and one rounded peen end.
